title: alchemilla vulgaris var. atlantica
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic lady's mantle, is a variety of the lady's mantle plant, a type of flowering plant in the rose family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating wounds, bruises, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris var. atlantica include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in some cosmetic products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
